---
title: "HEAPO – Linear Model"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 5
)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(car)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

set.seed(42)

styled_table <- function(df, caption = "") {
  df %>%
    kable(caption = caption, digits = 4) %>%
    kable_styling(
      bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
      full_width = FALSE
    )
}
```

```{r load-data}
heapo_modelling <- readRDS(here("data_processed", "heapo", "heapo_modelling.rds"))
```
